postgresVersion.promptMessage: What PostgreSQL version would you like to use? (e.g. 15, 17.6)

outputImageSlug.promptMessage: What would you like to use as the output image slug? (e.g. 'latest', '18', '18-alpine')

validateRegex.message: Invalid image slug. It must start with an alphanumeric character and can only contain alphanumeric characters, dots, dashes, and underscores.
